app.title: Tamer Interactive Geo-Library
app.description: Demonstration build of the Tamer Interactive Geo-Library, Digital Reading & Community Engagement Hub

home.title: Tamer Interactive Geo-Library
home.tagline: A living map of libraries, reading adventures and community stories across Palestine.

map.title: Interactive Geo-Library
map.intro: Find partner libraries across Palestine and browse the books available at each one.

passport.title: Digital Reading Passport
passport.intro: Log books, earn badges and watch your reading adventure grow.

facilitators.title: Facilitator Hub
facilitators.intro: Ready-to-use activity recipes and lessons learned from the field.

roadmap.title: Roadmap
roadmap.intro: What is live in this demo and what ships in the full build.

roadmap.note: This demonstration deliberately builds a small set of components to production depth. Everything marked for the full build is scoped and delivered as part of the complete platform.

geo.title: Interactive Geo-Library
geo.b1: Map of partner libraries with city and name filters
geo.b2: Library cards with live book availability
geo.b3: Nearby-library discovery across the full network

passport.title: Digital Reading Passport
passport.b1: Child profile with XP, badges and a reading log
passport.b2: Simulated QR check-in with instant rewards
passport.b3: Real QR codes in libraries and synced profiles

hub.title: Facilitator & Community Hub
hub.b1: 18 bilingual activity recipes with field lessons
hub.b2: AI semantic search in Arabic and English

reading.title: Digital Reading & e-Library
reading.b1: Book catalogue with bilingual detail pages
reading.b3: Full e-book reader and audiobook streaming

admin.title: Administration & Roles
admin.b1: "View as" switcher previews all four audiences

copilot.heading: Discussion questions
copilot.intro: Generate age-appropriate questions for a reading circle around this book.

hub.empty: No matching recipes. Try different words, or browse all recipes.

passport.logCount: {count, plural, one {# book logged} other {# books logged}}
passport.scanHint: Hold the book's QR code inside the frame
passport.noMoreBooks: You've logged every book in the demo!

map.noMapBody: Add a Mapbox token to enable the interactive map. All libraries are listed here in the meantime.
